title: Create Pretty Copper Sheets
description: Prettier 6.0 copper sheets. Hate the new copper sheets? Un-uglified them for you.
body:
Are you like me and you saw the new copper sheet texture and thought, "eww!"? Yeah, me too. So here is the old version of the copper sheet with a new coat of colors!

![New copper sheet shown on the ground](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WhyNotDogie/gallery/refs/heads/main/Screenshot%202025-06-25%20181639.png)
